channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US Official: Very Few Nvidia H200 Chips Sent to China
item.description: A senior U.S. official told Congress on Tuesday that only a small number of Nvidia H200 chips have been shipped to China or Hong Kong.

item.title: Trump Administration Ends Biden-Era LGBTQ Foster Care Rule
item.description: The Trump administration on Tuesday officially rescinded a Biden-era rule that aimed to require foster care placements for LGBTQ-identifying children.

item.title: Lindsey Graham's Sister Becomes South Carolina's First Female Senator
item.description: Darline Graham was appointed to fill her late brother's Senate term, becoming the first woman to represent South Carolina in the Senate.

item.title: Speaker Mike Johnson Delivers Stern Warning on GOP's Anti-Communism Stance
